subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Turn thy gaze unto the Kingdom of the All-Merciful and draw light from the celestial orb. Let thy tongue arise to teach [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی توجه بملکوت رحمانی کن و اقتباس انوار از کوکب آسمانی لسان بتبلیغ
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
